feedItems.description: allocated £3.3m to Planning & Development (≈£33 per resident)
allocated £5.4m to Environment & Streets (≈£55 per resident)
allocated £5.2m to Council Running Costs (≈£53 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £71 (3.2%) to £2280
